15. I am now going to ask you a few questions, and I would like you to rate your experience on a scale of 1 to 5, much like how grades are given in school, where 1 is the worst and 5 is the best.
Let me give you an example: imagine I were to ask you, "How is your day going today?" You would tell me: 1 means it is going extremely poorly; 2 means it is going somewhat poorly; 3 means it is neither good nor bad; 4 means it is going well; and 5 means it is going exceptionally well.
